source.title: When to Pause or Stop Gospel Conversations
source.summary: Safety indicators to watch for: (1) Escalating anger or hostility that won't de-escalate; (2) Threats of violence or harm; (3) Family members arriving who create unsafe dynamics; (4) Someone becoming distressed beyond healthy discomfort; (5) Your own emotional exhaustion compromising wisdom; (6) Public attention that could endanger the person; (7) Clear signals they want to end the conversation. Wisdom means knowing when to pause, pray, and trust God's timing. Stopping a conversation isn't failure—it's discernment. The goal is long-term relationship, not winning an argument.
